daily_focus.description: LEADS Higher Secondary School, Langkerding, is honoured to receive a letter of appreciation from Shri Vijay Kumar Mantri, IAS, Commissioner & Secretary, Education Department, Government of Meghalaya, congratulating the school for achieving a remarkable 100% pass result in the SSLC Examinations. The recognition highlights the dedication of our students, teachers and leadership in fostering academic excellence and a strong learning environment. This achievement marks a proud milestone in our journey of excellence.
daily_focus.alt: LEADS Higher Secondary School, Langkerding, is honoured to receive a letter of appreciation from Shri Vijay Kumar Mantri, IAS, Commissioner & Secretary, Education Department, Government of Meghalaya, congratulating the school for achieving a remarkable 100% pass result in the SSLC Examinations. The recognition highlights the dedication of our students, teachers and leadership in fostering academic excellence and a strong learning environment. This achievement marks a proud milestone in our journey of excellence.

daily_focus.description: LEADS secured first place at the Green-Preneurship 2026 competition, held at BDW International School, the event was sponsored by Meghalaya Prime Startup, competing against 10 participants from premier institutes across Shillong. This achievement has significantly increased LEADS’ visibility in schools across the city.

daily_focus.description: From May 4th to 7th, LEADS Higher Secondary School ignited with competitive spirit and athletic excellence. Our Annual Sports Day 2026 showcased incredible teamwork, resilience, and talent. Congratulations to all participants for making this year’s event truly unforgettable!

entries.thought_of_the_day: Success is not a one-time event, but the result of consistent daily effort, habits, and discipline

entries.principal_message:
🎉 Congratulations to Our Brilliant Achievers!🎉

LEADS Higher Secondary School, Shillong, proudly celebrates the outstanding success of our students in the Class X SSLC and Class XII HSSLC Examinations 2026.

We are delighted to announce a 100% pass result, a testament to the dedication, perseverance, and hard work of our students, guided by the unwavering commitment of our teachers and the support of parents.

This achievement reflects not only academic excellence but also the strength of character, discipline, and resilience that our students have demonstrated throughout their journey.

To all our successful candidates — this is just the beginning. Continue to dream big, stay curious, and strive for excellence in all that you do.

👏 Well done, and best wishes for your future endeavours!

— Barrilyne Lyngdoh, Principal, LEADS Higher Secondary School, Shillong

daily_focus.description: The Parent–Teacher Meeting for the First Terminal 2026 was successfully held, sharing key instructions for students’ welfare. A resource person from Faith Foundation, Shillong, conducted an awareness session on child protection and appropriate care. Parents also interacted with class teachers to discuss their children’s academic progress, behaviour, and co-curricular participation.

order_of_the_day: Today is Day 5 of the week
entries.principal_message: As we begin the new session, please prioritize punctuality and respectful conduct. Starting this Monday, we will resume a full-day schedule; ensure you bring all required textbooks and notebooks. Please note that new houses will be assigned to all students.
entries.bible_verse: For you were once darkness, but now you are light in the Lord. Live as children of light.
entries.additional_notes: Additionally, march past practice will take place after the first period. Finally, a reminder for Class X students: Board Exams are scheduled for the first week of December.
